# Suzy Wood

> Suzy Wood is a Cairo-based studio crafting heirloom-quality, made-to-order nursery and toddler furniture in solid wood with non-toxic finishes.

We design and build cribs, beds, dressers, wardrobes, and changing tables for babies and toddlers. Every piece is made to order in our Cairo workshop and delivered across Egypt.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand overview, featured pieces, and how we work.
- [Shop the Collection](/shop): Browse all handcrafted nursery and toddler furniture.
- [Our Craft](/our-craft): How we design and build pieces in our Cairo workshop.
- [Custom Builds](/custom-builds): Commission a one-of-a-kind piece tailored to your space.
- [Book a Measurement](/book): Schedule an at-home measurement visit.
- [Track Your Order](/track-order): Check the status of an existing order.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch about a project or order.
- [FAQ](/faq): Answers about ordering, delivery, custom builds, care, and returns.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
